business_problem: Hershey Entertainment & Resorts (HE&R) needed to personalize experiences for highly varied guests across an amusement park, hotel, hockey team and entertainment venues, but its prior reliance on manual data sampling from Google Analytics and call recordings meant it could only review small slices of customer signals. The contact center also absorbed high volumes of repetitive calls — particularly seasonal-employee shift call-offs and password resets — diverting agents from complex guest issues.
solution_summary: Hershey Entertainment & Resorts built a comprehensive customer and employee engagement platform using BigQuery, Gemini, Conversational Agents, and the Customer Engagement Suite IVR ('Agnes'). Guest service data from calls and web activity aggregates into BigQuery, where Gemini analyzes sentiment, engagement surveys, and interaction patterns. Conversational Agents power a chatbot deployed on the website within 40 hours to handle invoice requests and password resets. The Customer Engagement Suite deploys 'Agnes', an agentic IVR system that recognizes callers, automates employee call-offs (25%+ of volume), and manages password reset requests (50%+ of calls) via webhook integrations to internal systems.
business_outcome: HE&R automated a large share of repetitive guest and employee contact-center interactions, freed staff to focus on complex requests and innovation, and shortened the loop from raw interaction data to actionable reporting.
metrics: Natural-language customer chatbot implemented in less than 40 hours
More than 25% of team-member shift call-off requests fully automated
More than 50% of password reset calls managed by Customer Engagement Suite
A full eight hours of employee work saved per day on call-off handling
Dialogflow-to-BigQuery-to-Looker Studio reporting built in 30 minutes
architecture_clues: Unified customer interaction data stored in BigQuery as the single analytical store
Vertex AI and Gemini summarize social-channel sentiment (e.g. the 'Connoisseurs' Facebook page) and the annual employee engagement survey
Website chatbot powered by Conversational Agents extended with a webhook that takes an email address, checks for stays in the last 60 days, and emails a PDF invoice
Dialogflow interactions tagged with three answer fields are pushed to BigQuery and visualized in Looker Studio
'Agnes' IVR on Customer Engagement Suite uses caller-ID webhooks to identify callers and read context (account lockouts, failed logins, open support tickets) from HE&R's enterprise systems
Agnes proactively suggests password reset emails to locked-out users rather than presenting an IVR menu
evidence_quotes: Implemented a natural language customer chatbot in less than 40 hours
Fully automated more than 25% of team member 'call off' requests
Manages 50%+ of password reset calls with Customer Engagement Suite
That's a full eight hours of employee work per day. By saving those hours, our people can spend time innovating and solving more complex guest problems.
We can take our Dialogflow interactions, push them to BigQuery by answering three questions in Dialogflow, and then go to Looker Studio to create a report in 30 minutes.
Since Agnes is plugged into our infrastructure, it can see things like account lockouts, failed logins, or open support tickets

solution_components.name: BigQuery
solution_components.role: Centralizes guest call data, web activity from Google Analytics, social sentiment from Facebook forums, and employee survey responses for comprehensive analysis.

solution_components.name: Gemini
solution_components.role: Analyzes complete call and engagement datasets to identify sentiment trends, summarizes employee engagement surveys in seconds, and provides actionable recommendations for guest experience improvements.

solution_components.name: Conversational Agents
solution_components.role: Powers the website chatbot that handles guest invoice requests and password resets with dynamic, segment-aware responses.

solution_components.name: Customer Engagement Suite
solution_components.role: Deploys 'Agnes' IVR agent that recognizes callers, orchestrates call-offs, manages password resets, and identifies customer needs via webhook integrations to backend systems.

solution_components.name: Dialogflow
solution_components.role: Enables natural language conversation flow design for both website chatbot and IVR interactions.

solution_components.name: Looker Studio
solution_components.role: Generates real-time reports from Dialogflow and BigQuery data, accessible to managers for call volume and performance monitoring.

solution_components.name: Google Analytics
solution_components.role: Tracks guest web sessions and engagement to feed into BigQuery for comprehensive customer journey analysis.

data_flow: Guest calls and web interactions flow into Google Analytics and BigQuery. Call metadata and IVR interactions captured by Customer Engagement Suite feed into BigQuery. Gemini analyzes aggregated data to identify patterns and sentiment. Website visitor behavior triggers Conversational Agents for chatbot responses. Employee or guest calls route through 'Agnes' which queries internal systems via webhooks to determine action (call-off, password reset, invoice request) and responds conversationally.
